results.rendered_html:
vyāpanna p. p.
1 Fallen into misfortune, ruined.
2 Failed, miscarried.
3 Hurt, injured.
4 Dead, expired, deceased; as in avyāpanna q. v.
5 Deranged, disordered.
6 Substituted, changed.
